title: AANA Authorization-State Robustness HF Validation
public_claim_boundary: This experiment evaluates AANA under noisy authorization/evidence conditions as an audit/control/verification layer. It is diagnostic held-out validation, not a human-reviewed public benchmark claim.
objective: Measure whether AANA prevents execution when authorization state, evidence integrity, tool category, or runtime route is noisy, stale, contradictory, missing, or incorrectly permissive.

outputs.raw_text_storage: Raw prompts, conversations, document text, spans, tool outputs, full argument values, and raw evidence text are not written to result artifacts; rows contain ids, hashes, perturbation names, route labels, argument keys, evidence counts, and safe decision metadata.
